results.title: hephaestus-panel08-full
results.prompt: Render this storyboard panel as a finished, standalone, full-frame cinematic image: over-the-shoulder from behind a gold automaton, the receding ranks of identical automata with the tiny smith among them. Match the art style, palette, the bearded blond smith Hephaestus, and the gold automata of the reference. ONE single full image only — no grid, no panels, no borders, no text, no labels, no captions.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Match the exact painterly cinematic concept-art style, palette, color, and rendering of the reference image — cool electric blue and violet shadow, warm gold automata, orange spark-light, volumetric haze, visible brushwork. Reproduce its look precisely.
